title: TR-Gold-Morph v2 Entry
description: Single token entry in the TR-Gold-Morph v2 corpus.

canonical.description: Canonical morphological label: 'lemma +TAG +TAG ...'. Null for drop tier.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for this entry's source (e.g., CC-BY-4.0).

confidence.description: Autolabel confidence score (1.0 = unambiguous; ensemble softmax for multi-candidate).

seed_agreement.description: Number of BERTurk ensemble seeds that voted for the winning candidate.

disambig_score.description: Average softmax score for the winning candidate across ensemble seeds.

candidate_count.description: Number of Zeyrek candidates before truncation.

boundaries.description: Morpheme boundary string e.g. 'ev|ler|i|nden'. Added by boundary annotator.

context_sentence.description: Sentence used for BERTurk disambiguation context (truncated to 200 chars).
